description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and slightly sloped roof, surrounded by a lush, landscaped garden featuring various trees, shrubs, and flowering plants. The exterior walls are primarily white with gray accents, and the windows are large and rectangular, arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The property includes a fenced yard with a small playhouse, outdoor seating area, and paved walkways. The main entrance is marked by a simple gate and a short path leading to the front door, which is partially sheltered by an overhang. The house features clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a strong emphasis on geometric forms. The overall design is contemporary, blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, large windows, and a landscaped garden with trees, shrubs, and outdoor amenities. The design is clean, geometric, and contemporary.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white and gray facade, flat roof, and dense landscaping with trees and shrubs behind the house.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, gate, front yard, and a variety of plants and outdoor features including a playhouse.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, outdoor seating area, and more extensive greenery with palm trees and flowering bushes.
description_view_3: Side/rear view showing the covered patio, glass structure, and the continuation of the landscaped garden.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a straight path, small gate, and a minimal overhang above the door, no porch or columns.
